LONG NAME: SR_SPLMTL_PHYS_ACTVTY_1_2_QTY 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 4 

SOURCE: AHC data system (derived) 

VALUES: 0–1050 
Missing 

COMMENT: This field represents total minutes (in the week) of moderate exercise.
